data.content: Revalidated implementation in /Users/cartine/foolery-6a0d after the retake note. Code remains limited to src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx and src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox-width.test.ts on commit 171b0ab9382f. Ran bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint (passes with the same pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx:368 for react-hooks/incompatible-library), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. Playwright check against http://localhost:3001/beats?beat=6a0d&detailRepo=%2FUsers%2Fcartine%2Ffoolery&repo=%2FUsers%2Fcartine%2Ffoolery confirmed the title enters inline edit mode on click, keeps focus with a visible text cursor, uses about 95.97% of the header row width, leaves a 12.74px gap before the Close button, has 0px borders, transparent background, appearance none, no outline, and 0px overlap with the Close button.
